page: Google Cloud Platform n4a-highmem-1 is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance featuring a dedicated x86_64 CPU architecture. This instance is configured with 1 vCPU and 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage options for persistent data.

The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention from neighboring tenants on the host system. With its high memory-to-CPU ratio, this instance is designed for workloads that require a larger memory footprint relative to compute capacity, such as small-scale databases, caching layers, and lightweight memory-intensive applications.
description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-highmem-1 is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance configured with 1 dedicated vCPU and 8.0 GB of RAM on an x86_64 architecture. Featuring an 8.0 GB memory-per-core ratio, this instance provides a high proportion of memory relative to its compute resources, making it highly efficient for memory-bound workloads that do not require extensive CPU capacity. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, and it provides zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. It is designed for lightweight databases, caching systems, and memory-sensitive background tasks that benefit from dedicated CPU allocation without resource sharing.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-highmem-1 is a memory-optimized instance featuring 1 dedicated x86_64 vCPU, 8.0 GB of RAM, and no bundled local storage or GPUs, designed for memory-sensitive workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-highmem-1 is an x86_64 instance with 1 dedicated vCPU and 8.0 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A dedicated single-core virtual machine featuring a high memory-to-CPU ratio for memory-sensitive workloads without local storage requirements.
bullet_points: 8.0 GB of system memory providing a high memory-to-core ratio
No bundled local storage or integrated GPU resources
Dedicated CPU allocation ensuring consistent execution performance
Suited for lightweight databases, caching layers, and memory-bound tasks
